title: Sardarpur Wildlife Sanctuary
tagline: Sardarpur Wildlife Sanctuary — wildlife reserve of Madhya Pradesh

overview.short: Sardarpur Wildlife Sanctuary is a protected area located in Dhar district, of Madhya Pradesh in India.
overview.description: Sardarpur Wildlife Sanctuary is a protected area located in Dhar district, of Madhya Pradesh in India. It was officially notified in 1983. Originally, the sanctuary spanned approximately 348 km² (34,800 ha). The landscape is dominated by open grasslands with patches of scrub and seasonal wetlands habitats.

topPlaces.name: Mohankheda
topPlaces.description: Mohan Kheda is a Śvetāmbara Jain tirtha (pilgrimage place) located in the Dhar district of Madhya Pradesh in India. The site is situated 105 kilometres (65 mi) from Indore and 47 km (29 mi) from Dhar on the Indore-Ahmedabad Highway.

topPlaces.name: Rajgarh, Dhar
topPlaces.description: Rajgarh is a town and a nagar panchay, near city of Dhar in Dhar district in the Indian state of Madhya Pradesh.

Rajgarh is a town and a nagar panchay, near city of Dhar in Dhar district in the Indian state of Madhya Pradesh.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Sardarpur Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The best time to visit Sardarpur Wildlife Sanctuary is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Sardarpur Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Devi Ahilya Bai Holkar Airport, Indore (91 km) and the nearest railway station is Vadodara Junction (184 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Sardarpur Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Sardarpur Wildlife Sanctuary at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Sardarpur Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: Stays in Sardarpur Wildlife Sanctuary start from ₹2,500 per night, with options across 5 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Sardarpur Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The top attractions are Mohankheda, Rajgarh, Dhar.
